news.title: Ipsen scuttles liver disease candidates from $952M Albireo acquisition
news.snippet: Ipsen has set aside the two drug candidates it picked up from a 2023 acquisition of liver disease specialist Albireo, with one of the assets discontinued entirely.

news.title: Bipartisan PRIMATE Act aims to ban monkey imports to US
news.snippet: A new bipartisan bill could end the import of primates for U.S. research, targeting the roughly 20,000 monkeys brought into the country each year for laboratories or their suppliers.

news.title: BioCryst scraps eye candidate to focus on rare diseases
news.snippet: The company announced it has concluded development of the plasma kallikrein inhibitor, which was being studied to treat diabetic macular edema.

news.title: GSK pens $1B deal with China’s SiranBio for oligonucleotide that could reduce abdominal fat
news.snippet: GSK has found another potential way to treat cardiometabolic disease with a modality close to the pharma’s heart—oligonucleotides.

news.title: Bayer buys Perfuse in $2.4B deal for midphase eye disease prospect
news.snippet: The buyout, which includes up to $2.15 billion in milestones, will give Bayer control of an eye disease implant that Perfuse linked to improved outcomes in a pair of phase 2 trials last year.

news.title: CellCentric raises $220M series D to advance myeloma drug through registration, eyes potential IPO
news.snippet: In the last three years, CellCentric CEO Will West has been on a journey that has transformed how he thinks about the future of his company. He used to be “obsessed with pharma deals,” he told Fierce

news.title: After a decade of hype, Najat Khan is bringing Recursion back down to earth
news.snippet: Chris Gibson built the pioneering AI biotech Recursion Pharmaceuticals on a foundation of bold promises. But after more than a decade at the helm, Gibson stepped down as CEO in November 2025. And his

news.title: Avalo’s phase 2 skin disease win fuels pursuit of AbbVie despite placebo headwind
news.snippet: The placebo-adjusted result fell short of the bar set by Avalo, analysts and AbbVie’s rival program, but the biotech’s stock jumped in premarket trading.

news.title: Novo CEO insists ‘no change in plan’ for CagriSema launch after single-chamber device ditched
news.snippet: Novo Nordisk’s CEO has insisted that plans to launch the GLP-1/amylin combo treatment CagriSema remain on track, despite the pharma ending work on a single-chamber delivery device.

news.title: J&J’s Ottava surgical robot meets primary endpoints in gastric bypass study
news.snippet: Johnson & Johnson MedTech is touting positive results from the first clinical study of its Ottava soft-tissue surgical robot, showing the system can safely perform gastric bypass surgery.

news.title: UPDATED: After Arcellx buyout close, Gilead trims 192 jobs at CAR-T biotech's Redwood City and Rockville outposts
news.snippet: With Gilead's $7.8 billion buyout of Arcellx complete, the California pharma is consolidating some of the workforce at the acquired company.

news.title: Madrigal continues MASH deal spree with $1B biobucks license for Arrowhead asset rejected by J&J
news.snippet: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals has struck a backloaded deal for the global license to an Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals phase 1 asset for patients with metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Cytospire's $83M for TCEs; Vivacta snags $50M+ series A
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Olympus, EndoRobotics in distribution pact for robot-assisted endoscopic tech
news.snippet: Olympus inked a collaboration deal for the global distribution of robot-assisted technologies produced by South Korea’s EndoRobotics with a focus on endoscopic procedures.

news.title: Sanofi expands AI capabilities, investing $294M to scale Toronto hub
news.snippet: Sanofi is supercharging its artificial intelligence capabilities. The French pharma is investing $294 million to expand its global AI center of excellence in Toronto, kicking off a scale-up of the dig

news.title: Sanofi asks to pull Tzield bid from FDA's controversial CNPV program: report
news.snippet: The FDA's Commissioner's National Priority Voucher program has been steeped in controversy since its inception. Now, Sanofi has asked that one of its applications be taken out of the fast-track progra

news.title: FDA rolls out 1-day assessment pilot in bid to refocus inspection resources
news.snippet: In a bid to better deploy its boots-on-the-ground resources, the FDA is rolling out a new pilot program, under which the regulator is leveraging “one-day inspectional assessments” to complement its tr

news.title: Novo CEO cites pricing 'sweet spot' as Wegovy pill debuts with $355M quarter
news.snippet: After several consecutive quarters on the backfoot, Danish drug juggernaut Novo Nordisk is receiving warmer feedback on its starting performance in 2026, thanks in no small part to its head start over

news.title: FDA blocks publication of COVID, shingles vaccine safety studies: NYT
news.snippet: The FDA-conducted studies reportedly found COVID vaccines and GSK's shingles vaccine Shringrix safe and effective, according to The New York Times.

news.title: Bayer diagnoses how to build trust in cell and gene therapies
news.snippet: Cell and gene therapy developers must build continuity of engagement to create trust in the modalities, according to a report by Bayer’s venture capital wing.

news.title: Touting $529B in savings over 10 years, White House looks to expand MFN deals with pharma
news.snippet: Following a series of “most favored nation” pricing deals with 17 large pharma companies, the Trump administration released a report Tuesday projecting potential $529 billion in savings from the polic

news.title: Novo Nordisk, Eli Lilly fined by French regulator over obesity drug promotions
news.snippet: As the promotion battle between old rivals Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly heats up, regulators in France are reminding the world’s two biggest obesity drugmakers what happens when promotion goes too far.

news.title: Lilly to invest $4.5B more into massive Indiana manufacturing complex
news.snippet: With commitments to invest more than $50 billion in building up its U.S. manufacturing presence, Eli Lilly has earmarked an additional $4.5 billion to upgrade two of its three planned production facil

news.title: After Alzheimer's agitation nod, Axsome jacks up Auvelity's peak sales projection to $8B
news.snippet: Fresh off gaining an FDA expansion for Auvelity as a treatment for agitation associated with Alzheimer’s disease, Axsome Therapeutics has projected peak sales for the non-antipsychotic drug to reach $

news.title: BioNTech to slash 1,860 jobs, exit sites in Germany and Singapore in major manufacturing pullback
news.snippet: The German vaccine maker plans to wind down operations at a handful of its sites in Germany plus one in Singapore, putting as many as 1,860 jobs on the chopping block.

news.title: Novartis to close German manufacturing site, cutting 220 jobs
news.snippet: Novartis is continuing its multiyear overhaul with new plans to shutter its production facility in Wehr, Germany, by 2028. The move, announced Tuesday, will eliminate about 220 jobs, according to Nova

news.title: Pfizer delivers strong Q1 but keeps guidance steady amid COVID seasonality
news.snippet: With a better-than-expected first quarter in the books, Pfizer—continuing to grapple with the post-pandemic overhang from its COVID-19 franchise—is sticking with the sales forecast it set earlier this

news.title: Prolific Machines sets monoclonal antibody manufacturing record with light-controlled platform
news.snippet: Though largely operating in the background until recently, Prolific Machines’ optogenetic approach to biomanufacturing is set to make waves thanks to the achievement of an impressive milestone in mono

news.title: Sanofi expands AI capabilities, investing $294M to scale Toronto hub
news.snippet: Sanofi is supercharging its artificial intelligence capabilities. The French pharma is investing $294 million to expand its global AI center of excellence in Toronto, kicking off a scale-up of the dig

news.title: Eyeing CAR-T autoimmune first, Kyverna hires pharma veteran as CCO
news.snippet: Kyverna Therapeutics is on the cusp of a historic first: getting a CAR-T therapy approved for an autoimmune disease—and now it’s looking to boost its commercial chops as it nears the finish line.

news.title: Trump administration’s drug strategy is at odds with recent actions on funding, policy
news.snippet: The White House nods to medication-assisted treatment and fentanyl test strips, despite recently placing new limits.

news.title: STAT+: Administration report on most favored nation drug pricing raises new details — and questions
news.snippet: Administration report on most-favored nation drug pricing raises new details — and questions.

news.title: STAT+: Sanofi asks to pull diabetes drug out of FDA voucher program after political appointee interfered with review
news.snippet: Sanofi has asked the FDA to pull its type 1 diabetes drug out of Commissioner Marty Makary’s new speedy drug review program.

news.title: STAT+: Color Health moving deeper into cancer services, complete with virtual ‘tumor boards’
news.snippet: Color Health, which coordinates cancer screening, is moving into a gap it observed — obtaining and coordinating actual cancer care.

news.title: Why the FDA is authorizing fruit-flavored vapes
news.snippet: Marty Makary says he was "skeptical initially" about flavored vapes but that age-gating technology could limit their use.

news.title: STAT+: How a global effort to explore the ‘dark proteome’ is upending our understanding of human disease
news.snippet: An international team has found thousands of mini-proteins, including some involved in cell division and DNA repair, as well as several unique to cancer cells.

news.title: STAT+: Novo Nordisk’s less-bad news on its Wegovy pill boosts earnings and share price
news.snippet: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP primary for Ohio governor, CellCentric raises $220M for myeloma drug, and more biotech news

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a PhRMA ad campaign aimed at 340B, sales of Novo’s obesity pill, and more
news.snippet: One of the most powerful pharmaceutical lobbying groups is launching a new seven-figure advertising blitz targeting a federal drug discount program

news.title: STAT+: Even at a meeting in Rome, FDA shifts are top of mind for gene therapy field
news.snippet: Cell and gene therapy makers met in Rome to discuss the field's outlook in Europe. One main topic of conversation: the FDA.

news.title: NHS cancer jab could save patients hours in hospital
news.snippet: Thousands of patients will be offered a new injectable form of an immunotherapy drug that takes minutes.

news.title: The struggle to get hold of medication in England is set to get worse
news.snippet: People living with conditions include heart problems, stroke risks, eye infections and bipolar are unable to get hold of the drugs they rely on.
